_comment: Example config for publishing/maintaining the streamo-library Record.
Equivalent to what scripts/publish-library.mjs spawns (after b64-decoding
the password). Use with: node bin/streamo.js --config env/example.library-publisher.json
homeKey is set so it's checked against the derived pubkey on startup —
catches a password typo before bytes hit the chain. See design.md §14.5.
DO NOT commit a real password here. This sample uses '<...>' placeholders.
